---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a scoped improvement to the workflow, scripts, or outputs
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Research or workflow problem

What cannot be done reliably with the current version?

## Proposed change

Describe the smallest useful change.

## Primary scope

- [ ] Core evidence model
- [ ] Study-design routing
- [ ] PDF processing
- [ ] Spreadsheet or report output
- [ ] Validation
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Integration

## Alternatives and tradeoffs

What other approaches did you consider?

## Validation example

Describe a synthetic or openly licensed case that could test this feature.
